title: Cool Tools
description: Makes tools and weapons look cooler
body:
Vanilla tools are basically just boring recolors, so I wanted to make them all unique from each other!
<details>
<summary>List of all tools and weapons</summary>

- Swords
- Pickaxes
- Axes
- Shovels
- Hoes
- Spears (+ in inventory textures are unique from in hand texture)
- Bows
- Crossbows
- Arrows
- Firework Rocket
- Fishing Rods
- Shears
- Flint and Steel
- Brush
- Stick
- Debug Stick
- Trident (+ new model if using cem mod)
- Mace
- Shield

</details>



Custom trident model requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)(or other cem mods) to work
